title: Handwritten Digit Classifier
description: A convolutional neural network trained on MNIST to recognize handwritten digits, with a live drawing canvas for real-time predictions.

title: Sentiment Analysis Dashboard
description: An NLP pipeline that scrapes tweets on a topic and visualizes sentiment trends over time using a fine-tuned transformer model.

title: Campus Navigator
description: A pathfinding web app that helps students find the shortest route between buildings on campus using Dijkstra's algorithm.
